title: Most implementation-ready: .patch + full files + snapshot + SQL verification + validation
public_claim: Most implementation-ready: .patch + full files + snapshot + SQL verification + validation is a preserved project packet for this is the most implementation-ready package in the bundle — not a spec, not a design brief, but an actual merge-ready patch bundle with both diff-format patches (diffs/) and full file contents (patch/), plus snapshot reference files to diff against, plus SQL verification.
distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
